'''Xaart''' was one of the ground troops under the command of [[Meetra Surik]] during the [[Battle of Dagary Minor]], one of the early losses for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the opening of the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. A veteran of the Mandalorian Wars, he served in later years as a covert diplomatic operative under the orders of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. Xaart lost contact with Surik until after the [[Jedi Civil War]], resurfacing on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] in [[3951 BBY]] as a secret Republic fact-finder in the capital city of [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]].

Xaart's mission was far more important to the fate of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] than was first realized by Surik; he determined that if Onderon were to successfully secede from the Republic, enough surrounding systems would join with it, eventually spelling the doom of the Republic. Ultimately the information was rendered useless as Onderon fell into civil war.

Although he had become stranded on the planet after the wars, he is amonr the people whom Surik can help to obtain a [[Starport visa|visa]] in order to travel back to his homeworld.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
